title: AI Pixel RPG 8-Bit
description: Transforms the photo into a retro 16-bit pixel art character and scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a retro 16-bit RPG video game pixel art style. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Use a limited but vibrant color palette, distinct pixelated textures, clean grid alignment, and pixel dithering for shading. Emulate the look of classic 90s console games like Chrono Trigger or Final VI.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, photographic look, high resolution, smooth gradients, 3D render, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, blurry
